author: Jeonghyeon Park
description: Highlight new or recently edited notes in the graph view, with one-click 'mark all as read'. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Jeonghyeon Park
manifest.description: Highlight new or recently edited notes in the graph view with a soft glow ring, with one-click 'mark all as read'.
manifest.name: Graph Unread Highlight

name: Graph Unread Highlight

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:

* 강조 효과 추가: 소프트 글로우 링 · 펄스 by @junghyunbak in https://github.com/junghyunbak/graph-unread-highlight/pull/2
